styleLock: Supercell-style stylized 3D cartoon (Clash of Clans / Brawl Stars aesthetic): chunky proportions with oversized heads and stubby limbs, exaggerated hand-painted textures, soft painterly shading with a clear primary light source from top-left and warm rim light from the right, thick dark brown outlines about 2-3% of the subject width so the silhouette pops on any background, hand-painted normal maps suggested through the shading (no hard rim lighting, no cel-shading bands), subsurface glow on translucent bits. Palette: warm backyard colony — deep mossy greens (#1d3a1a, #2c4724, #3d7a2c), warm brass and gold accents (#ffd98a, #b97e1c) for highlights, soft earth browns (#3a2512, #6b4420) for outlines and woodwork, never pastel. Top-down 3/4 perspective around 30 degrees. Soft oval drop shadow directly under the subject, about 70% alpha, never a hard cast shadow. 128x128 transparent PNG (RGBA alpha=0 outside the subject), subject fills ~85% of the canvas centered, no background, no ground plane, no grass tufts, no text, no watermark, no border, no caption. Cohesive, production-grade game asset quality.

factions.Bees: lemon yellow with black stripes, gauzy wings
factions.Spiders: deep purple with neon green eyes

units.WorkerAnt: a CHEAP SWARM WORKER: a cheerful worker ant, six legs, NO weapon — instead clearly carrying a TINY GREEN LEAF over its head and a tiny gathering backpack on its back, friendly non-threatening pose, eager helper expression so the player reads CHEAP DISPOSABLE WORKER not soldier
units.SoldierAnt: a FRONTLINE MELEE FIGHTER: a sturdy soldier ant brandishing a SHARP CARVED-WOOD SHORT-SWORD or pointed twig blade in one front leg, oversized mandibles bared, paper crown helmet, classic shield silhouette under the other arm, confident planted combat stance, weapon CLEARLY VISIBLE from the front so the player reads MELEE FIGHTER
units.DirtDigger: an UNDERGROUND BREACHER: a burly ant with COMICALLY OVERSIZED METALLIC DRILL-CLAWS at the front (silver/iron-tipped), small mining goggles over the eyes, a tiny pickaxe slung over the shoulder, dirt clumps clinging to the claws, stubborn determined expression, the drill-claws are the dominant visual element so the player reads TUNNELER/BREACHER
units.Forager: a LOOT SPECIALIST: a fuzzy bee with a BULGING tiny satchel-of-nectar across its body and a small GOLD-COIN charm on the satchel strap, cute fluttery wings, alert opportunistic look-around pose, the satchel is the dominant visual element so the player reads LOOT GATHERER not fighter
units.Wasp: a FLYING SNIPER: a sleek wasp with a LONG NEEDLE-LIKE STINGER tipped with a glowing yellow venom-drop pointing forward, bandit mask over eyes, narrow targeting glare, hovering combat pose, glassy wings mid-beat, the long pointed stinger is the dominant weapon read so the player reads RANGED SNIPER
units.HoneyTank: a HEAVY BRUISER: a round, heavily armored bee draped in thick honeycomb-plate armor, a HEAVY HONEY-DRIPPING BLUDGEON CLUB held in front, helmet of rivets, slow imposing planted stance, the armor mass and the club are the dominant visual elements so the player reads TANK/BRUISER
units.ShieldBeetle: an ANTI-TURRET VANGUARD: a tank-like beetle holding a BIG ROUND RIVETED METAL SHIELD in front of itself (shield clearly visible from the front, taking up much of the silhouette), riveted carapace, helmet, small legs, planted defensive stance, the shield is the dominant visual element so the player reads SHIELD-WALL SOLDIER
units.BombBeetle: a ONE-SHOT SAPPER: a cute beetle carrying a GIANT ROUND DANDELION-PUFF BOMB above its head with a SHORT LIT FUSE sparking, small wide nervous eyes, the bomb is the dominant visual element (bigger than the beetle's head), clearly a one-shot kamikaze unit, FUSE-SPARK glow visible
units.Roller: a MOMENTUM CRUSHER: a muscular beetle rolling a HUGE round dew-droplet WRECKING-BALL in front of itself, the droplet is the dominant visual element (bigger than the beetle), motion-streak suggesting forward momentum, scuffs on the ground beneath, clearly a charging crusher
units.Jumper: a WALL-HOPPING HARASSER: a fuzzy jumping spider mid-jump pose with bent springy back legs and FOREFANGS BARED, a tiny COILED ROPE-GRAPPLE trailing from one leg, alert cat-like agile face, the leaping pose + fangs are the dominant visual elements so the player reads WALL-HOPPER ASSASSIN
units.WebSetter: a CROWD CONTROLLER: a spinner spider actively weaving a GLOWING SILVER WEB-NET BETWEEN ITS FRONT LEGS (the web is the dominant visual element, occupying much of the silhouette), tiny twigs anchoring the corners, focused craft expression, the web-net is the unit's clear weapon
units.Ambusher: a BURST ASSASSIN: a camouflaged spider crouched in a pounce pose with CURVED VENOM-DROPPING FANGS bared and a SMALL CURVED DAGGER held in one front leg, a half-leaf cloak draped over its back, glowing predator eyes, the fangs + dagger are the dominant visual elements so the player reads ASSASSIN
units.FireAnt: a STICKY BURN ATTACKER: a fierce fire ant with a GLOWING ORANGE EMBER CREST on her head, BRIGHT ORANGE FLAMES licking around her mandibles (mandibles tipped with active fire), small lava-cracks on her body, aggressive forward stance, the FIRE around the mouth is the dominant visual element so the player reads BURN/IGNITE
units.Termite: a BUILDING-EATER: a pale termite with HUGE METALLIC WOOD-CHEWING MANDIBLES (chrome/iron-tipped, much bigger than its head) covered in fresh wood splinters, hungry determined expression, gnawed sawdust falling from its mouth, the mandibles are the dominant visual element so the player reads STRUCTURE-CHEWER
units.Dragonfly: a FAST FLYER: a sleek dragonfly scout with a LONG SPEAR-LIKE TAIL-STINGER pointing back and BLURRED FAST GLASSY WINGS (motion blur lines suggesting high speed), narrow head, sleek hunting body, mid-flight pose with body angled forward, the speed-streaks + spear-tail are the dominant visual elements so the player reads FAST AERIAL HUNTER
units.Mantis: a SINGLE-TARGET BURST FIGHTER: a sharp mantis warrior with folded RAPTORIAL FORELEGS held high like dual SCYTHES (the curved blade-arms are the dominant visual element, hooked and razor-edged), leaf-green armor plates on the body, predatory triangular head, poised mid-strike stance, the scythe-arms are unmistakable weapons so the player reads PRECISION BURST
units.Scarab: a SPAWN-ON-DEATH HEAVY: a heavy jeweled scarab beetle with a polished gold-and-emerald shell, a SMALL SPIKED HORN on its forehead, ancient regal look, sturdy planted body, a TINY LIVE MINI-SCARAB peeking out from under one shell-plate so the player reads SPAWNS-WHEN-DEFEATED, the regal shell + horn are the dominant visual elements
units.MiniScarab: a SCARAB OFFSPRING: a tiny cute scarab hatchling with a GLOSSY POLISHED SHELL miniaturized from the parent (same gold-and-emerald palette), nimble little legs mid-charge, a tiny pointed nose-horn, eager forward charge pose, clearly a baby version of the Scarab so the player reads SPAWNED MINION
units.NestSpider: a TUNNEL DEFENDER: a compact spider defender with an extra pair of FANG-LIKE FOREFANGS bared (the fangs are the dominant visual element), eight short bristly legs, tunnel-dwelling alert pose, multiple bright glowing eyes scanning, a tiny SILK-WRAPPED EGG-SAC on its back so the player reads NEST-SPAWNED DEFENDER

heroes.Mantis: a HERO ASSASSIN named the Bladewidow: a regal praying-mantis champion with TWO oversized GLOWING EMERALD SCYTHE-FORELEGS held high in a duelling stance (the brilliant emerald-and-gold blade-arms are the dominant visual element, etched with thin gold filigree and trailing faint green motion ribbons), gleaming hand-painted leaf-green carapace with brass filigree shoulder plates and a small heart-shaped jade gem on the chest, predatory triangular head with intense glowing yellow eyes and a thin golden circlet, a flowing burgundy SILK SCARF wrapped around the neck and trailing behind, hooded cloak fragments fluttering, a faint warm GOLD HALO behind the head reading as legendary status, poised on tip-toes mid-leap with one scythe cocked back to strike, clearly more powerful and ornate than a regular Mantis unit (twice the silhouette mass, twice the gold trim) so the player instantly reads HERO. 128x128 transparent PNG.
heroes.HerculesBeetle: a HERO TANK named the Bulwark: a colossal Hercules beetle champion with a single MASSIVE forked HORN crowning the head (the horn is the dominant visual element, larger than its body, polished gleaming bronze with scarlet runic etchings glowing along the inner edge), gleaming dark-bronze armored carapace etched with hammered honeycomb runes, ornate brass shoulder plates and a heavy chest-plate emblazoned with a stylized leaf-shield crest, four planted muscular legs in a rooted charging stance kicking up small dust puffs, faint warm GOLD HALO around the head and a soft lavender SHIELD-GLOW SHIMMER wrapping the entire body in a translucent dome so the player reads BUFF AURA, immovable rock-of-the-line silhouette, clearly more powerful and ornate than a regular HerculesBeetle (huge horn, glowing aura, runic plating) so the player instantly reads HERO. 128x128 transparent PNG.
heroes.WaspQueen: a HERO SUPPORT FLYER named the Honey Sovereign: a regal wasp queen champion with FOUR golden translucent wings spread wide (the wings are the dominant visual element, glittering with falling gold-dust trails and faint pink sparkles), a slender amber-and-black striped body draped in a sheer royal sash of cream silk, an ornate amber-and-pearl CROWN with three tall spires perched on her head, holding a small softly GLOWING DROPLET of NECTAR HEALING POTION cradled in her front legs, faint warm GOLD HALO around the head and a soft pink HEART-SHAPED SPARKLE aura around her body so the player reads HEALER, hovering mid-air pose with the abdomen curved gracefully downward and the legs tucked, clearly more powerful and ornate than a regular Wasp (queen scale, crown, four wings, healing aura) so the player instantly reads HERO. 128x128 transparent PNG.
heroes.StagBeetle: a HERO SIEGE BREAKER named the Wallbreaker: a hulking Stag beetle champion with COLOSSAL forked MANDIBLES splayed wide (the mandibles are the dominant visual element, almost as wide as the body, gleaming polished obsidian with scarlet-glow runes etched along the inner edge), polished obsidian-black carapace plated in scarlet-trimmed brass with a single heroic chestplate medallion, a heavy iron WAR-HAMMER strapped diagonally across the back so the head juts above one shoulder, planted forward charging stance kicking up dust and small rubble chunks, faint warm GOLD HALO around the head and tiny crackling RED ENERGY MOTES dancing around the mandibles and hammer head so the player reads ANTI-BUILDING DAMAGE, low aggressive forward lean with shoulders hunched, clearly more powerful and ornate than a regular Beetle (oversized mandibles, war-hammer, scarlet trim, halo) so the player instantly reads HERO. 128x128 transparent PNG.

stories.story-springs-1: Comic-strip panel 1 of 6 — 'The Last Warm Morning'. A wide cinematic painterly illustration in Supercell-style stylized 3D cartoon (Clash of Clans / Brawl Stars aesthetic): the OLD ANT QUEEN — large, regal, oversized head, brass-and-emerald crown, leaf-fibre robe — perched on the rim of a cracked terracotta pot in the morning sun, sipping a glistening dewdrop from a folded leaf cup. Three smaller daughter ants gathered at her feet looking up adoringly. Warm golden-hour sunlight rakes across the scene from the upper-left, soft rim light on the queen's carapace. Mossy garden background out of focus. Painterly hand-painted shading, thick dark-brown outlines, deep mossy greens (#1d3a1a, #3d7a2c) and warm brass-gold (#d4af37, #ffd98a) palette, soft earth browns. Mood: peace, abundance, the last good day. 1024x576 PNG, opaque background fine. No text, no UI, no logos, no border, no watermark.
stories.story-springs-2: Comic-strip panel 2 of 6 — 'The Cold'. Wide cinematic painterly illustration in Supercell-style stylized 3D cartoon: a single cruel line of FROST creeping diagonally across the entire garden, freezing leaves mid-curl, ice climbing the terracotta pot from panel 1, dewdrops crystallised mid-fall. NO living figures visible — only the ABSENCE of them. Cold blue-white light from a low winter sun, long blue shadows, the warm brass-and-gold palette of panel 1 desaturated into pale teals and frost-whites. Painterly hand-painted shading, thick dark-brown outlines, atmospheric haze in the distance. Mood: stillness, loss, the world holding its breath. 1024x576 PNG, opaque background fine. No text, no UI, no logos, no border, no watermark.
stories.story-springs-3: Comic-strip panel 3 of 6 — 'The Throne Splits'. Wide cinematic painterly illustration in Supercell-style stylized 3D cartoon, set inside the warm-glowing UNDERGROUND ANT THRONE CHAMBER lit by amber fungus-glow: a long HAIRLINE CRACK runs vertically the full height of a polished obsidian-and-gold throne (the crack is the dominant visual element, glowing faintly along its length). TWO DAUGHTER QUEENS stand on either side of the throne, mirror-poses, oversized heads with rival paper-and-brass coronets, jaws set, eyes locked across the crack. Warm fungus-gold sidelight on their faces, deep amber underglow on the chamber walls, painterly hand-painted texture. Thick dark-brown outlines, deep mossy greens and warm brass-gold palette. Mood: succession, schism, a family becoming rivals. 1024x576 PNG, opaque background fine. No text, no UI, no logos, no border, no watermark.
stories.story-springs-4: Comic-strip panel 4 of 6 — 'The Wasp at the Gate'. Wide cinematic painterly illustration in Supercell-style stylized 3D cartoon: a sleek black-and-yellow WASP MERCENARY hovering at the mouth of an ant-colony chamber, four glassy wings mid-beat, holding out one front leg with a TINY ROLLED LEAF-CONTRACT pinched in the claw. TWO ANT GUARD SOLDIERS flank the chamber mouth — sturdy soldier ants with oversized mandibles bared, paper-crown helmets, twig short-swords drawn, rigidly tense, stoic. Backlight from inside the warm chamber silhouettes the wasp's wings into glowing amber discs. Painterly hand-painted shading, thick dark-brown outlines, deep mossy greens and warm brass-gold palette. Mood: a foreign offer, a deal not yet made, suspicion. 1024x576 PNG, opaque background fine. No text, no UI, no logos, no border, no watermark.
stories.story-springs-5: Comic-strip panel 5 of 6 — 'The Pact'. Wide cinematic painterly illustration in Supercell-style stylized 3D cartoon: an ANT QUEEN (regal, paper-crown, brass shoulder filigree) and a BEETLE CHIEFTAIN (iridescent teal carapace, runed brass plate, oversized horn) leaning across a flat folded LEAF that serves as their treaty table, pressing two TINY SEAL-RINGS together at the centre of the leaf. A single TORCH burns to one side, throwing both figures into rim-lit silhouette against deep cave shadow. In the back corner, partially in shadow, a SPIDER stands eight-legged and unmoving — eight glowing predator eyes, watching, witness, silent. Painterly hand-painted shading, thick dark-brown outlines, deep mossy greens and warm brass-gold palette, dramatic chiaroscuro. Mood: ceremony, alliance, the deal that started the war. 1024x576 PNG, opaque background fine. No text, no UI, no logos, no border, no watermark.
stories.story-springs-6: Comic-strip panel 6 of 6 — 'The First Raid'. Wide cinematic painterly illustration in Supercell-style stylized 3D cartoon: the PLAYER'S ANT QUEEN standing in the mouth of her own chamber on the right of the frame, antennae arched, glowing PHEROMONE WHORLS rising from her antennae like inked smoke. The whorls drift across the panel toward the LEFT-HAND DISTANT SILHOUETTE of a RIVAL HIVE — a dark earth-mound with lit tunnel-windows, partially obscured by leaf-fringe in the foreground. Dawn light cresting the horizon behind the rival hive, warm coral-and-amber sky. Painterly hand-painted shading, thick dark-brown outlines, deep mossy greens and warm brass-gold palette, atmospheric haze for distance. Mood: declaration, the first move of a long war. 1024x576 PNG, opaque background fine. No text, no UI, no logos, no border, no watermark.
stories.story-crowns-1: Comic-strip panel 1 of 6 — 'The Last Forager'. Wide cinematic painterly illustration in Supercell-style stylized 3D cartoon: a small LONE WORKER ANT climbing a frost-covered stem in the foreground, carrying a folded green LEAF over her back. Far below at the base of the stem a tiny DEW COLLECTOR building glows with a warm amber light. High in the night sky above, a sleek DRAGONFLY SCOUT is wheeling on glassy moonlit wings, cast as a clear silhouette against a half-moon. The whole panel is in cold deep-blue night palette except for two warm focal points — the worker's leaf and the distant collector glow — pulling the eye through the composition. Painterly hand-painted shading, thick dark-brown outlines, atmospheric haze for depth. Mood: tension, surveillance, the calm before. 1024x576 PNG, opaque background fine. No text, no UI, no logos, no border, no watermark.
stories.story-crowns-2: Comic-strip panel 2 of 6 — 'The Bladewidow Comes Home'. Wide cinematic painterly illustration in Supercell-style stylized 3D cartoon: the HERO PRAYING-MANTIS CHAMPION known as the BLADEWIDOW — emerald-and-gold scythe forelegs, brass shoulder filigree, burgundy silk scarf trailing behind, faint warm gold halo behind her head — stepping over a low LEAF WALL and ducking under a thorn-hedge into a moonlit ant-colony courtyard. A MUSHROOM TURRET in the mid-ground swings toward her on instinct, spore-cap glowing, but its aim relaxes as it recognises her. THREE SOLDIER ANTS stand in a defensive triangle around the chamber mouth on the right — twig swords half-drawn. Cool moonlight from above, warm chamber-glow from the right, silhouetting the Mantis in half-rim light. Painterly hand-painted shading, thick dark-brown outlines, deep mossy greens and warm brass-gold palette. Mood: arrival of a hero, threat de-escalating into oath. 1024x576 PNG, opaque background fine. No text, no UI, no logos, no border, no watermark.
stories.story-crowns-3: Comic-strip panel 3 of 6 — 'The Bulwark Holds the Breach'. Wide cinematic painterly illustration in Supercell-style stylized 3D cartoon: the HERO HERCULES BEETLE CHAMPION known as the BULWARK — colossal silhouette, single massive forked bronze HORN crowning the head, dark-bronze runed carapace, lavender SHIELD-GLOW SHIMMER wrapping his entire body in a translucent dome — planted dead centre in a wide gap blown through a PEBBLE BUNKER WALL, dust still drifting from the breach. A massive enemy ROLLER BEETLE crashes into him at full momentum from the left, crushed against his horn in mid-impact, motion-streak lines and pebble shrapnel flying outward. Two friendly SOLDIER ANTS file past behind him, weapons up. Smouldering walls in the background. Painterly hand-painted shading, thick dark-brown outlines, deep mossy greens and warm brass-gold palette, dramatic backlight from a fire offscreen-right. Mood: an immovable oath, the rock the wave breaks against. 1024x576 PNG, opaque background fine. No text, no UI, no logos, no border, no watermark.
stories.story-crowns-4: Comic-strip panel 4 of 6 — 'The Honey Sovereign Defects'. Wide cinematic painterly illustration in Supercell-style stylized 3D cartoon: the HERO WASP QUEEN CHAMPION known as the HONEY SOVEREIGN — slender amber-and-black striped body, FOUR golden translucent wings spread wide and shedding gold-dust trails, faint warm gold halo behind her head, a soft pink heart-shaped sparkle aura around her — hovering above the ROOFTOP TILES of an ant-colony QUEEN CHAMBER at golden hour, kneeling mid-air to lay an ornate AMBER-AND-PEARL CROWN onto the surface tiles in front of her like a calling card. Below her, looking up, two regular WASP MERCENARIES hover uncertain, and a single FORAGER BEE on the rooftop has paused with her satchel half-lifted to stare. Warm coral-and-gold sunset palette, pollen drifting through the air. Painterly hand-painted shading, thick dark-brown outlines. Mood: a queen choosing exile, a court being won. 1024x576 PNG, opaque background fine. No text, no UI, no logos, no border, no watermark.
stories.story-crowns-5: Comic-strip panel 5 of 6 — 'The Wallbreaker at the Gate'. Wide cinematic painterly illustration in Supercell-style stylized 3D cartoon: the HERO STAG BEETLE CHAMPION known as the WALLBREAKER — colossal hunched silhouette, splayed obsidian forked mandibles dominating the upper third of the frame, polished black-and-scarlet carapace, a heavy iron WAR-HAMMER strapped diagonally across his back, faint warm gold halo behind his head, tiny crackling red energy motes dancing around the mandibles — standing alone at the open courtyard GATE of the player's ant colony, casting an enormous shadow back across the tiles. A nervous CIRCLE of SOLDIER ANTS surrounds him at a respectful distance, twig swords drawn but lowered. Past him, far down the courtyard, the PLAYER'S QUEEN visible in the chamber mouth, antennae high, considering him. Painterly hand-painted shading, thick dark-brown outlines, deep mossy greens and warm brass-gold palette, low-angle dramatic late-afternoon sun. Mood: the fourth crown chooses, audience with the queen. 1024x576 PNG, opaque background fine. No text, no UI, no logos, no border, no watermark.
stories.story-crowns-6: Comic-strip panel 6 of 6 — 'The Marching Season'. Wide cinematic painterly illustration in Supercell-style stylized 3D cartoon, the climactic group-shot panel: a sweeping panoramic battlefield at golden hour — the FOUR HEROES leading a marching swarm across the foreground (BLADEWIDOW front-left with scythes raised, BULWARK front-centre planted with shimmer dome, HONEY SOVEREIGN aloft top-centre with four wings spread and gold-dust trail, WALLBREAKER front-right with war-hammer ready). Behind them a roaring multi-faction swarm: WORKER ANTS carrying leaves, SOLDIER ANTS with twig swords, FIRE ANTS trailing tiny flames, DIRT DIGGERS surfacing from a tunnel, FORAGER BEES, WASP SNIPERS overhead, a SHIELD BEETLE on the right flank, a ROLLER charging behind, a JUMPER spider mid-leap, a WEB SETTER trailing silk, AMBUSHER spiders flanking from shadow, TERMITES gnawing at a distant rival wall, DRAGONFLIES diving on enemy turrets. In the far background a RIVAL HIVE EARTH-MOUND beginning to crumble, smoke columns, the eastern ridge backlit by a heroic warm sun. Painterly hand-painted shading, thick dark-brown outlines, deep mossy greens and warm brass-gold palette, full Supercell pop, atmospheric haze for distance. Mood: triumph, the war on the move, every named character on the field. 1024x576 PNG, opaque background fine. No text, no UI, no logos, no border, no watermark.

walkCycles.WorkerAnt_poseA: a cheerful worker ant carrying a tiny leaf and a tiny backpack, six legs clearly visible. Pose: LEFT legs forward, RIGHT legs back, body leaning slightly forward into the step. Single 128x128 pixel transparent PNG, subject fills ~85% of the canvas, centered, facing viewer at the same 30-degree top-down 3/4 camera as the static sprite. No background, no ground plane, no text.

buildings.QueenChamber: a DEFENSIVE CORE: majestic glowing queen chamber throne-room built into a layered dirt mound, lit from within with a warm glow, throne-like silhouette, ornate brass-rimmed crown symbol visible on the front, clearly the most important structure
buildings.DewCollector: a RESOURCE GENERATOR: a shimmering dew drop suspended in a twig cradle with a small leaf-funnel redirecting water downward, sparkling collector clearly optimized to gather from above, income-producing symbol
buildings.MushroomTurret: a RANGED DEFENSE: a red-capped mushroom turret with a PROMINENT small brass cannon jutting from the stem pointing outward, white spots on the cap, clearly a turret with visible firepower, defensive threat posture
buildings.LeafWall: a STRAIGHT HORIZONTAL FENCE PANEL section of leaf-wall, perfectly flat and rectangular (not tilted, not diagonal, not curved), long axis running left-to-right across the tile like a Clash-of-Clans wall segment, tightly woven chlorophyll bricks with spider-silk seams between them, top and bottom edges parallel and crisp so panels line up edge-to-edge to form a continuous wall, GREEN color emphasis for blocked-path visual
buildings.LeafWallV: a STRAIGHT VERTICAL FENCE PANEL section of leaf-wall, perfectly flat and rectangular (not tilted, not diagonal, not curved), long axis running top-to-bottom across the tile like a Clash-of-Clans wall segment standing upright, tightly woven chlorophyll bricks with spider-silk seams between them, left and right edges parallel and crisp so panels line up edge-to-edge to form a continuous vertical wall, weave bands run perpendicular to the long axis (HORIZONTAL bands across the panel), GREEN color emphasis for blocked-path visual, IDENTICAL palette and styling to the horizontal LeafWall so vertical and horizontal pieces look like the same wall material
buildings.PebbleBunker: a HEAVY DEFENSE: a fortress of stacked river pebbles taller than it is wide, moss in the cracks, SOLID reinforced structure, clearly stronger than leaf-wall, defense-bunker silhouette
buildings.LarvaNursery: a RESOURCE GENERATOR: a cozy domed underground nursery with glowing larva pods visible through several oval windows, nursery entrance hole at the base, clearly a spawner/grower producing units, PURPLE/PINK glow for life-generation
buildings.SugarVault: a STORAGE CORE: a heavy wooden vault door with a GIANT sugar-cube lock visible on the front, ornate brass hinges and trim, sprinkles and sweet-dust floating around, clearly a treasure room and storage container, valuable-goods visual
buildings.TunnelJunction: a CONNECTOR: a clean carved earth tunnel entrance with MULTIPLE distinct paths radiating outward (at least 3 exits visible), junction-hub silhouette showing layer-switching capability, underground connection point
buildings.DungeonTrap: a ONE-SHOT TRAP: a disguised pitfall covered with twigs and fallen leaves, an ominous dark SPIKE trap visible inside, shadow-filled depth showing danger, ambush-trap visual, clearly dangerous surprise
buildings.AcidSpitter: a SPLASH DAMAGE TURRET: a chunky pitcher-plant style acid mortar turret with a SWOLLEN bulb OVERFLOWING with glowing green acid, organic artillery silhouette, clearly a ranged splash weapon, GLOWING GREEN acid threat-color
buildings.SporeTower: an ANTI-AIR TURRET: a tall lookout-tower mushroom with a bulbous PUFFBALL cap at the top ejecting spore clouds upward, tall silhouette emphasizing anti-air role, clearly targets flying threats, SPORE CLOUDS visible
buildings.RootSnare: a ONE-SHOT TRAP: a coiled root trap made from thorny vines and buried hooks forming a SNARE/NOOSE shape, tense coiled silhouette, clearly a root-and-snare freezing trap, TRAP mechanism visible
buildings.HiddenStinger: a HIDDEN TURRET: a stealthy tesla-like stinger turret hidden and camouflaged among LEAVES and twigs, a NEEDLE-THIN cannon barely visible poking through the leaves, hidden ambush-posture, DANGER symbol or spark visible suggesting electrical threat
buildings.SpiderNest: a DEFENDER SPAWNER: a sinister underground spider nest dug into soil with MULTIPLE silk-wrapped egg sacs visible, tunnel openings around the base, clearly a defender-generator producing spider defenders, EGGS and SPIDERS visible
buildings.ThornHedge: a HORIZONTAL REINFORCED BLOCKER: a section of reinforced thorn hedge, long axis running left-to-right across the tile, DENSE brambles with SHARP outward-pointing spikes along the top and bottom edges creating a spiky visual barrier, clearly horizontal so it lines up edge-to-edge with neighbour pieces like a Clash-of-Clans wall, SPIKE visual threat
buildings.ThornHedgeV: a VERTICAL REINFORCED BLOCKER: a section of reinforced thorn hedge standing upright, long axis running top-to-bottom across the tile, DENSE brambles with SHARP outward-pointing spikes along the LEFT and RIGHT edges creating a spiky visual barrier, clearly vertical so it lines up edge-to-edge with neighbour pieces to form a continuous vertical wall, SPIKE visual threat, IDENTICAL palette and styling to the horizontal ThornHedge so vertical and horizontal pieces look like the same hedge material
buildings.AphidFarm: a PREMIUM RESOURCE GENERATOR: a small fenced PASTURE on a low earth platform with three or four chubby pastel-green APHIDS grazing on a curling tendril of fresh leaf-vine, a tiny brass MILKING SPOUT angled from one aphid's belly into a stoneware pail beneath, gentle warm pink-and-cream glow under the platform suggesting precious milk drip, the grazing aphids and the milk pail are the dominant visual elements so the player reads APHID MILK PRODUCER, brass-trimmed posts at the corners with curling vine motifs, soft pearl shimmer rising from the pail, NO faces on the platform itself, NO text. 128x128 transparent PNG, single building, centered.
buildings.LeafSilo: a LEAF STORAGE BIN: a sturdy underground silo made of stacked clay rings woven with reinforcing root-strands, brimming with PILED FRESH-CUT GREEN LEAF FRAGMENTS spilling slightly over the lip (the leaves are the dominant visual element so the player reads LEAF STORAGE), a small access ladder along one side, brass-bound rim, partially recessed into rich brown earth showing this is an underground building, NO faces, NO characters, NO text. 128x128 transparent PNG, single building, centered.
buildings.MilkPot: a MILK STORAGE VESSEL: a tall fat-bellied glazed clay pot sealed with a wax-fastened lid, painted with cream-and-amber rings and a tiny drawn aphid emblem on the front, GLOWING SOFT-PEARL LIQUID visible through a small viewing window cut near the top (the pearly milk glow is the dominant visual element so the player reads APHID MILK STORAGE), warm yellow under-lighting making the wax seal radiate, partially recessed into rich brown earth showing underground placement, NO faces, NO characters, NO text. 128x128 transparent PNG, single building, centered.

menuUi.ui-button-primary-bg: a modern, shiny game button background in vibrant coral (#ff6b9d). Polished, glossy surface with a subtle reflective HIGHLIGHT along the top edge suggesting light from above (not a 3D tilt, purely lighting). Soft rounded corners (8px). Minimal 1–2px border in darker coral for definition. Clean, contemporary aesthetic — NO carved wood, NO brass trim, NO ornate details. Smooth gradient from slightly darker at the edges. Flat 2D asset rendered head-on, viewed straight from the front with zero perspective, zero isometric tilt. 256x128 pixels transparent PNG, designed for 9-slice scaling. No text, no icons, no logos — just the button surface.
menuUi.ui-button-secondary-bg: a modern, shiny game button background in sky blue (#5bc0de). Polished, glossy surface with a subtle top-edge highlight suggesting premium quality. Soft rounded corners (8px). Minimal border in darker blue (1–2px). Clean, contemporary — NO wooden elements, NO ornate scrollwork. Smooth finish with gentle gradient for depth. Flat 2D asset rendered head-on, viewed straight-on with zero perspective, zero tilt. 256x128 pixels transparent PNG, designed for 9-slice scaling. No text, no icons.
menuUi.ui-panel-bg: a modern, shiny game card/panel background in off-white (#f5f5f0). Clean, minimalist surface with NO wood texture, NO ornate borders. Subtle gradient (slightly darker at bottom) for layered depth. Soft rounded corners (12px). Minimal 1px border in earth-tone (#3d5a2a @ 0.2 alpha) or none. Soft drop shadow below (2–4px offset, 8–12px blur, dark @ 0.15 alpha) for elevation. Contemporary, glass-like feel. Flat 2D asset rendered head-on, zero perspective, zero tilt. 512x256 pixels transparent PNG, designed for 9-slice scaling. No text, no icons.
menuUi.ui-hud-bg: a modern, shiny horizontal HUD / top-banner background in deep earth-green (#3d5a2a). Polished surface with subtle gradient (slightly darker at top for depth). Minimal ornament — NO ornamental scrollwork, NO brass corners. Soft rounded corners on ends if applicable. Minimal 1px accent stripe in gold (#d4af37) at top or bottom for emphasis. Clean, scannable layout ready for resource pills and UI elements. Flat 2D asset rendered head-on, zero perspective. 512x96 pixels transparent PNG, designed to tile horizontally. The middle surface should be smooth and neutral so pills sit cleanly. No text, no icons.
menuUi.ui-title-banner: a modern, shiny decorative title banner in gold (#d4af37) and earth-green (#3d5a2a). Polished, iridescent appearance — suggests premium quality without ornate detail. Soft rounded corners, clean minimalist design. NO ornate scrollwork, NO leaf flourishes, NO wooden backing. Subtle reflection highlight at top suggesting light source. Contemporary, elegant aesthetic. Flat 2D asset rendered head-on, viewer directly in front, zero perspective, zero tilt. 512x128 pixels transparent PNG. Empty central area so the game title can be drawn on top. No text.
menuUi.ui-board-tile-surface: a modern, shiny seamless earth-tone ground tile for the game board. Top-down (bird's-eye) view directly from above, zero perspective, zero tilt. Surface includes natural earth materials — soil, moss, small pebbles, organic growth — rendered in contemporary style: polished, slightly iridescent appearance suggesting a treated surface (not raw earth). Color palette: earth-greens (#3d5a2a to #4a6b3a) with warm earth undertones. 128x128 pixels tileable PNG (edges match perfectly for seamless repeat). Soft, subtle lighting with NO hard shadows. No text, no buildings, no characters — just ground.
menuUi.ui-resource-pill-honey: a modern, shiny rounded HUD resource chip in off-white (#f5f5f0) with a polished honey droplet (amber/gold, glossy) at its left end. Minimal border in earth-tone (#3d5a2a @ 0.3 alpha), 1–2px. Soft rounded corners (pill-shaped). Subtle drop shadow below. The droplet should have a reflective highlight suggesting premium, precious quality. Contemporary, clean aesthetic. Flat 2D asset rendered head-on, zero perspective. 256x64 pixels transparent PNG, designed for 9-slice scaling. No text, no numbers — just the frame and the droplet.
menuUi.ui-resource-pill-sugar: a modern, shiny rounded HUD resource chip in off-white (#f5f5f0) with a polished sugar crystal (faceted, gem-like, blue-and-white iridescent) at its left end. menuUi.ui-resource-pill-grubs: a modern, shiny rounded HUD resource chip in off-white (#f5f5f0) with a polished larva/grub pod (gem-like, rose-pink, with glossy highlights and iridescent sheen) at its left end. menuUi.ui-logo: the HIVE WARS game logo in modern, shiny style. Polished lettering in iridescent gold (#d4af37) and earth-green (#3d5a2a), NO heavy wooden borders. A small heroic worker ant silhouette on top of the letters holding a tiny leaf banner, rendered in contemporary style. Subtle iridescent glow around the letters suggesting premium quality. Contemporary, elegant aesthetic. The words HIVE WARS clearly readable, side-by-side on a single line (HIVE on the left, WARS on the right) so the logo reads as a horizontal wordmark. Flat 2D asset rendered head-on, perfectly symmetrical, zero perspective. 512x128 pixels transparent PNG (4:1 horizontal aspect ratio matching /units/logo-hivewars.svg so the AI replacement drops in without layout shift), centered on the canvas. No extra taglines, no subtitles, no watermarks — just the HIVE WARS wordmark and the small ant crest.
menuUi.landing-hero: a cinematic painted hero-banner illustration for the HIVE WARS landing page. Wide horizontal panorama (16:9) showing a sun-drenched backyard battleground at golden hour: a towering ant-colony EARTH MOUND on the right with glowing tunnel windows and a brass-rimmed queen chamber at its peak; a marching SWARM of warm-brown soldier ants and red-orange fire ants advancing across mossy soil in the foreground, weapons raised; a fuzzy bumble-bee scout and a sleek wasp hovering on glassy wings to the left; mushroom-cap turrets and woven leaf-walls dotting the ridgeline; a giant translucent dewdrop catching warm rim light. Dramatic painterly composition with clear foreground / midground / background depth, warm directional sunlight from the upper-left, soft rim light on the heroes, gentle atmospheric haze in the distance for scale. Style: Supercell stylized 3D cartoon (Clash of Clans / Brawl Stars aesthetic) — chunky proportions, hand-painted textures, thick dark-brown outlines on the hero characters so they pop. Palette: deep mossy greens (#1d3a1a, #3d7a2c), warm brass and gold (#d4af37, #ffd98a), soft earth browns (#3a2512, #6b4420); never pastel. Strict NO list: no text of any kind, no logos, no UI overlays, no health bars, no score, no watermark, no border, no signature. Pure illustration, full-bleed and ready to be cropped or letter-boxed by the page. 1280x720 PNG, opaque background is fine.
menuUi.queen-default: a majestic amber-colored ant queen portrait, stylized 3D cartoon bust from the shoulders up facing forward, oversized head with warm amber carapace and soft painterly shading, subtle crown of brass scrollwork resting on her head, kind intelligent eyes with a soft glow, faint warm rim light from behind, painterly hand-painted look in the Supercell / Clash of Clans style. Flat 2D asset rendered head-on, perfectly symmetrical, zero perspective, zero tilt, zero isometric angle. 256x256 pixels transparent PNG centered on the canvas. Background transparent. No text, no watermark.

menuUi.queen-verdant: an ant queen portrait, stylized 3D cartoon bust from the shoulders up, moss-green carapace overgrown with tiny vines and small white flowers at her shoulders, a crown of twisted brass roots, gentle emerald eyes, soft painterly spring-light shading, Supercell / Clash of Clans style. Flat 2D asset rendered head-on, perfectly symmetrical, zero perspective, zero tilt. 256x256 pixels transparent PNG centered on the canvas. No text.
menuUi.queen-silver: an ant queen portrait, stylized 3D cartoon bust from the shoulders up, polished silver-white carapace with chrome highlights, a minimalist silver crown with one white gem, thoughtful pale eyes, cool painterly moonlit rim light, Supercell / Clash of Clans style. Flat 2D asset rendered head-on, perfectly symmetrical, zero perspective, zero tilt. 256x256 pixels transparent PNG centered on the canvas. No text.
menuUi.ui-discover-banner: a wide cinematic promotional banner for the Hive Wars Store section (1200x630, 16:9 aspect ratio). Composition: a sweeping underground hive chamber viewed from above — a massive hexagonal city carved from rich earth tones with glowing crystalline formations and flowing fungal gardens. A diverse swarm of units (soldier ants, wasps, beetles, spiders) marching across the landscape in organized formations, their carapaces glistening with highlights. Soft bioluminescent glow from crystals and resources scattered throughout. Foreground: treasures (sugar crystals, dewdrops, glowing orbs) catching light. Background: layers of tunnels and chambers fading into atmospheric haze. Style: Supercell stylized 3D cartoon with chunky proportions, painterly hand-painted textures, thick dark outlines for silhouette pop. Palette: deep earth browns (#3f2715, #5c3a1e) grading into rich moss-greens (#2c4724, #3d7a2c), warm gold highlights (#d4af37, #ffd98a), crystalline blues and purples for magical elements. Dramatic directional lighting from multiple crystal sources, deep shadows in tunnels for depth. Strict NO list: no text, no UI overlays, no HUD elements, no watermarks, no borders, no logos. Pure illustration, full-bleed, ready to serve as a landing page promotional banner. 1200x630 PNG with opaque earth-toned background blending naturally with the page.
menuUi.board-background: a seamless game board background with a natural grass and earth surface, viewed from a top-down 45-degree perspective. Top-down isometric view showing dirt, grass tufts, moss patches, and small rocks scattered across the ground. Color palette: rich moss-greens (#3d5a2a, #4a6b3a), warm earth browns (#5c3a1e, #7a5a3a), with soft organic variation. Style: Supercell stylized cartoon with painterly hand-painted textures, soft natural lighting with subtle shadows from grass and stones creating depth without harsh contrast. The surface should feel like a natural backyard battle arena — alive and organic but game-ready. Minimal detail so sprites show clearly on top. Seamless/tileable edges so it works across different board sizes. No text, no buildings, no characters, no UI elements. Pure background surface ready for game board rendering. Opaque PNG (can have alpha transparency for edges if needed), recommended 1024x1024 or larger for full board coverage
